goal: Merge coin-earned + sign-in popups; standardize coin image to webp-200 everywhere; improve OAuth-return sign-in reliability
done: (1) MERGED POPUPS: coin-earned popup (meow-coin.js) grows an inline 'Sign in to keep your coins' CTA (Sign in with Google + Maybe later) when signed OUT — no separate gate; removed the old showSignInGate from reading.js. Timing robust: no auto-close until auth resolves (slow auth can't dismiss before a signed-out user sees the CTA), 6s safety cap; signed-in keeps ~2s auto-dismiss. (2) COIN IMAGE: generated assets/meow-coin-200.webp (rasterized svg, transparent 200px), swapped every /assets/meow-coin.svg -> webp (chip, coin popup, achievement board, achievement-unlocked popup, decks, shop); board coin 11px->14px. (3) SIGN-IN: common.js eagerly creates the Supabase client (getCurrentUser) on OAuth-return URLs (?code=/#access_token/?error=) so the PKCE code is exchanged + session persists on EVERY page. Cache-bust 20260622o -> 20260623a; www synced + new webp.
fix: merged coin+signin popup with auth-aware timing; single webp-200 coin everywhere; eager OAuth-code exchange on return pages.
verified: headless signed-out coin popup shows coin webp + 'Sign in to keep your coins' + Google CTA
headless coin webp renders in chip + achievement board
filed: LIKELY sign-in root cause OUTSIDE code: Supabase Site URL / Redirect-URL allow-list. If OAuth return lands on a different origin than start (apex meowtarot.com vs www.meowtarot.com — apex serves stale build), the per-origin PKCE verifier isnt found -> no session. FIX in Supabase dashboard: Site URL = https://www.meowtarot.com; add https://www.meowtarot.com/** + https://meowtarot.com/** to Redirect URLs; start sign-in on www or 301 apex->www.
